name: 7 Wonders (Second Edition)
description: 7 Wonders is Antoine Bauza's Spiel-des-Jahres-2011-winning card-drafting civilization game — across three Ages, players draft cards from rotating hands to build their wonder, develop science and military might, expand commerce, and edge ahead of their two neighbors. Plays seven in 30 minutes. The Second Edition refines the components and rulebook of the original. Still the gold standard for simultaneous drafting.
